title: angolluma somalensis
intro: Angolluma somalensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the Apocynaceae family, which includes over 2,000 species of plants. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Angolluma somalensis typically involve drying and crushing the leaves, then mixing them with water to create a medicinal tea or infusion.
